text:
**Exactly 9 issues were opened** in the `acme/web` repository. Each one corresponds to a merged PR that closes a Linear issue:

| # | New Issue Title | Source PR (repo) | Closes |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash | #1002 (acme/web) | ENG-136 |
| 2 | Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash | #1003 (acme/api) | ENG-103 |
| 3 | Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: fix ios18-crash | #1010 (acme/api) | ENG-151 |
| 4 | Verify: Search relevance regression: fix search-relevance | #1017 (acme/infra) | ENG-117 |
| 5 | Verify: Rate limiter false positives: add test for rate-limiter | #1024 (acme/web) | ENG-134 |
| 6 | Verify: Primary DB failover is slow: guard against db-failover | #1025 (acme/mobile) | ENG-135 |
| 7 | Verify: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE: fix oauth-migration | #1030 (acme/mobile) | ENG-124 |
| 8 | Verify: Image uploads time out over 5MB: add test for image-uploads | #1033 (acme/infra) | ENG-147 |
| 9 | Verify: SSO SCIM provisioning errors: refactor sso-provisioning | #1037 (acme/web) | ENG-102 |

All 9 issues are open and include a body referencing the source PR, its repo, and the Linear issue it closes.

text: Now let me find all merged PRs that close a Linear issue, then insert the corresponding GitHub issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT number, repo, title, closes_linear
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'merged'
  AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL
  AND closes_linear != ''"}

data: {"rows":[{"number":1002,"repo":"acme/web","title":"Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash","closes_linear":"ENG-136"},{"number":1003,"repo":"acme/api","title":"Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash","closes_linear":"ENG-103"},{"number":1010,"repo":"acme/a…(+1032)

text: I found 9 merged PRs that close a Linear issue. Now I'll open a new GitHub issue in `acme/web` for each one.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"INSERT INTO github_issues (repo, title, state, body)
SELECT
  'acme/web',
  'Verify: ' || title,
  'open',
  'Created to verify merged PR #' || number || ' (repo: ' || repo || ') which closes ' || closes_linear || '.'
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'merged'
  AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL
  AND closes_linear != ''"}
